record.field: Pregnant animals, animals with fever or illness
Mild lethargy, temporary loss of appetite

Durable stainless steel food bowl, easy to clean
Elevated water bowl to reduce neck strain
Assorted puzzle toys and chew toys
Cozy indoor kennel perfect for small dogs. Climate controlled, soundproof, natural lighting.
Spacious indoor kennel for large dogs. Climate controlled, soundproof, play area.
Multi-level cat condo with climbing areas. Climate controlled, scratching posts, hideaway spots.
Large outdoor run with covered shelter. Weather protection, secure fencing, natural grass.
Premium luxury suite with all amenities. Climate controlled, TV, webcam access, premium bedding.
Complete bath with shampoo, conditioner, and brush-out
Complete grooming including bath, brush, nail trim, ear cleaning, and styling
Specialized grooming for pets with medical conditions or senior pets
Professional de-shedding treatment to reduce loose hair

Master basic commands, improve leash behavior, build confidence
Advanced training for dogs ready to take commands to the next level
Advanced commands, off-leash reliability, behavior modification
Early socialization and basic manners for young puppies
Socialization, bite inhibition, house training basics
Addressing specific behavioral issues and problem solving
Address specific behavioral issues, build positive associations
Training cats for better behavior and mental stimulation
Litter box training, scratching post use, basic commands
Annual wellness checkup and vaccination update
Pet is in good health. Schedule next appointment in 6 months.
Full grooming service including bath, brush, and nail trim
Luna was cooperative during grooming. Recommend monthly visits.
Max showed good progress with sit and stay commands.
Thumper is healthy. Continue current diet and exercise routine.
Buddy settled in well. Pick-up scheduled for Friday.
Appointment cancelled by owner. Reschedule for next week.
Advanced training session - recall and heel commands
Feed twice daily with premium dog food. Regular exercise in outdoor area.
Luna prefers quiet environment. Provide extra blankets and her favorite toy.
Max is very active. Needs multiple daily walks and play sessions.
Whiskers is shy. Give him time to adjust and provide hiding spots.
Rabbit care: fresh hay daily, limited pellets, fresh vegetables twice daily.
Slight weight loss due to increased activity
Maine Coon - normal weight for breed
Pet was very cooperative during the session
Excellent service, very happy with the results
Luna is sensitive around her ears
Max has a lot of loose hair, please be thorough
Owner requested extra attention to shedding
Senior cat - please be gentle and patient
Required extra care due to age, handled well
Quick nail trim between full grooming sessions
Buddy showed good focus and quick learning
Max needs more work on stay command
Puppy socialization with other young dogs
Advanced recall training in distracting environment
Cat enrichment activities and positive reinforcement
Whiskers responded well to clicker training

Pet is responding well to the diet. Weight loss of 0.7kg in first month.

Luna has shown improved mobility and energy levels

Wound cleaned and bandaged, no stitches needed
